TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_mipuputay_a_Di'tu, title = mipuputay_a_Di'tu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/mipuputay_a_Di'tu} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == u Sakizayz binacadan amin u tademaw izaw saza ku mipuputay a Di'tu ci Silingaan nilacul ika uzipan nu mita izaw saza ku mipuputay kitaan a tademaw, == namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ==
S.PHON: == kakir~ɾiman == u sakizajz binaʦadan amin u tadəmaw izaw saza ku mipuputaj a diʔ~ʡtu ʦi sir~ɾiŋaan nir~ɾaʦur~ɾ ika uzipan nu mita izaw saza ku mipuputaj kitaan a tadəmaw, == namakajniaj a nasur~ɾitan nasakamuan atu natinəŋan ==
S.FORM: == kakiliman == u Sakizayz binacadan amin u tademaw izaw saza ku mipuputay a Di'tu ci Silingaan nilacul ika uzipan nu mita izaw saza ku mipuputay kitaan a tademaw, == namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ==
S.PHON: == kakir~ɾiman == u sakizajz binaʦadan amin u tadəmaw izaw saza ku mipuputaj a diʔ~ʡtu ʦi sir~ɾiŋaan nir~ɾaʦur~ɾ ika uzipan nu mita izaw saza ku mipuputaj kitaan a tadəmaw, == namakajniaj a nasur~ɾitan nasakamuan atu natinəŋan ==
